content: W3champions API: The backend (github.com/w3champions/website-backend) powers w3champions.com, API at website-backend.w3champions.com/api/. Data available: player game-mode stats (MMR, wins, losses, win rate per race), match history (all matches from endscreen data - heroes used, duration, race played, result), season rankings, MMR distribution, winrates per race and map. Uses MongoDB event-driven architecture. Auth uses BattleTag via Battle.net OAuth. No dedicated public API docs, but all endpoints are used by the open-source frontend. Match data includes: what was visible in the end-score screen. CRITICAL LIMITATION: No build order timing, no APM, no replay data - only outcome stats (W/L, race played, season MMR). Raw replay data is in .w3g format (parseable by wc3ai.com, w3g Python library) but w3champions does not expose replay files via API.
